seoTitle: Kumarina vs Kununoppin — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kumarina and Kununoppin. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kumarina and Kununoppin.
heading: Kumarina vs Kununoppin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kumarina, Western Australia and Kununoppin, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kununoppin has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Kumarina (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kumarina or Kununoppin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kumarina has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Kununoppin scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kumarina scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Kununoppin scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kumarina or Kununoppin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kununoppin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
